g.text: Please use CSS style instead of skinparam ParticipantPadding
(type: QuestionType, competencies: List<Competency>, difficultyTier: DifficultyTier, nuggetMultiplier: Float?) [TLS]
Exactly one tier from {Beginner, Intermediate, Advanced}
Must be multiple_choice, drag_and_drop, or code_snippet
setState(Pre1, Pre2) ' system running, instructor logged in
No two DifficultyTags on same resource
Fails: at least one competency required
Database not updated, state remains Pre1/Pre2 (PostError)
